text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... I grossly underestimated how<n>emotional it
would be running with<n>everyone and seeing the
race up<n>close and personal!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Still! No matter how overwhelming<n>today's race
was, it hasn't quenched<n>my thirst to see Umas
running on dirt...<n>So, you know what that means!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Next up is the Hyacinth Stakes at the<n>beginning of
next year! Until then, it's<n>grind, grind, grind!
